back_translation: For the choirmaster. With stringed instruments. A Maskil of David.
When the Ziphites went to Saul and said, 'Is David not hiding among us?'
Save me, O God, by Your name, and vindicate me by Your might.
Hear my prayer, O God; listen to the words of my mouth.
For strangers rise up against me, and ruthless men seek my life; they have no regard for God. Selah
Behold, God is my helper; the Lord is the upholder of my life.
He will repay my enemies with evil; in Your faithfulness, destroy them.
I will sacrifice a freewill offering to You; I will praise Your name, O LORD, for it is good.
For He has delivered me from every trouble, and my eye has looked on my enemies.
